title: Twitter @Hesamation
summary:
Anthropic released an article “Building effective agents” recently (Dec) and they share a bit of their experience in building their agents and explain common workflow patterns.

Cool read to get you started. https://t.co/QaB9DsL7MZ

title: flowshow
summary:
Just a super thin wrapper for Python tasks that form a flow. 
 bash uv pip install flowshow Flowshow provides a task decorator that helps you track and visualize the execution of your Python functions. There is also a context manager called span that can do the same as well as some logging utilities like info, warning and addartifacts. In short, here's how to use it
